summary: Complete visual engine implementation testing - all features working perfectly. Tested login/onboarding/dashboard flow, visual engine intensities, CSS overlays, dashboard content, and AI Core functionality.
passed_tests: Login page loads with visual engine at 0.3 intensity
Onboarding page loads with visual engine at 0.5 intensity
Dashboard loads with visual engine at 1.0 intensity
All 3 CSS overlay layers present: lighting-overlay, core-wash, atmosphere-haze
Dashboard layout intact: top-bar, left-column, ai-core-placeholder, right-column
All content counts correct: 3 attention items, 3 projects, 4 trades, 4 schedule items, 4 urgent tasks, 4 overview stats
AI Core button clickable and overlay opens successfully
AI Core overlay functionality working with message input/response
Visual engine canvas present and rendering (1024x600)
Full flow login → onboarding → dashboard works seamlessly
PostFX effects and GLSL shaders working (bloom, vignette, chromatic aberration visible)
MoltenCore shader with proper color ramp (white→orange→red→black)
Panel material styling with crushed blacks and rim lighting
Proper intensity scaling across different pages
